name: kismet-capture-antsdr-droneid
title: kismet-capture-antsdr-droneid
description:
capture driver for Kismet
Kismet is a wireless network and device detector, sniffer, wardriving tool,
and WIDS (wireless intrusion detection) framework.
.
Kismet works with Wi-Fi interfaces, Bluetooth interfaces, some SDR (software
defined radio) hardware like the RTLSDR, and other specialized capture
hardware.
.
This package contains a capture driver for Kismet. It supports sending data to
a remote Kismet server.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use kismet_cap_antsdr_droneid because capture driver for Kismet.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use kismet_cap_antsdr_droneid as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `kismet_cap_antsdr_droneid [options] [args]` as documented upstream for kismet_cap_antsdr_droneid.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair kismet_cap_antsdr_droneid with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `kismet_cap_antsdr_droneid --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
